description: You are a BIM Coordinator auditing a model received from a subcontractor. The architectural shell model for the FZK-Haus project was exported poorly from a generic 3D modeler, and elements have been exported as generic 'IfcBuildingElementProxy'. The degraded model is located at /home/ga/IFCModels/fzk_proxy_corrupted.ifc. Reassign the IFC classes of the generic proxy elements to their correct semantic types (IfcWall, IfcWindow, IfcDoor, and IfcSlab) based on their descriptive names while preserving their original geometry. Save the corrected IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_remediated.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=65, requires partial remediation across multiple categories and geometry validation.
